name: Sheep Quest
short_description: The definitive atmospheric frustration platformer. Embark on a surreal odyssey from humble pastures to the ends of existence in Sheep Quest; a game for the gentleman of refined taste.
detailed_description:
Sheep Quest is a high-difficulty 2D platformer where you, a sheep of questionable qualifications and more courage than sense, are chosen by providence for a special quest.

  • Leap across traps clearly designed by sadists

  • Solve puzzles that probably made sense to someone

  • Face off against six bosses, each eager to remind you that wool is not armor

  • 23 handcrafted levels await you, each more dangerous than the last

  • Grab fate by the horns and uncover the secrets of the universe

Master new abilities as you progress— double jump, ground slam, attack, dodge — transforming from a helpless lamb into a force capable of shaking the stars.

Journey from the pastoral to the cosmic:
Launch to the moon, duel mechanical werewolves, brave alternate dimensions, and ascend to battle ancient gods beyond space and time.

Will you withstand the onslaught, seize your golden destiny, and bring the universe to its absurd conclusion?
